# `LlmGatewayConfig` manifest

Reference for `kind: LlmGatewayConfig` (apiVersion `vais.agents/v1`). Authoring schema: [`LlmGatewayConfig.schema.json`](../schemas/LlmGatewayConfig.schema.json).

## Example

```yaml
apiVersion: vais.agents/v1
kind: LlmGatewayConfig
metadata:
  id: example-llm-gw
  version: "1.0"
  description: Example LLM gateway config.
spec:
  middleware:
  - name: logging
  rateLimit:
    requestsPerMinute: 120
```
